name: Aasimar
age: reach adulthood at 18 and live up to 150 years
size_description: Aasimar are similar in size and build to humans.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Abyssal.

language_options.additional: One additional language of your choice

traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.desc: You have resistance to radiant damage and necrotic damage.

traits.name: Light Bringer
traits.desc: You know the light cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can cast the daylight spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for this spell.

traits.name: Angel's Eyes
traits.desc: You have darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Celestial Legacy
traits.desc: When you die, a luminous, winged avatar of your choice appears. The avatar speaks a message from your deity before you are resurrected. This trait can be used only once.

subspecies.name: Fallen Aasimar
subspecies.desc: Your lineage is tainted by a curse that marks you as an agent of death.

desc: Aasimar are mortals touched by the power of celestial beings.

name: Dragonborn
age: reach adulthood at 12 and live up to 80 years
size_description: Dragonborn are taller and heavier than humans, standing between 6 and 7 feet tall and averaging around 250 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Draconic.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.desc: You choose a draconic ancestry, which determines your damage resistance and breath weapon.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.desc: You can exhale destructive energy in a line or cone. The type of damage and the shape of the breath weapon depend on your draconic ancestry.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.desc: You have resistance to a damage type determined by your draconic ancestry.

traits.name: Dragonborn Legacy
traits.desc: You know the fire bolt cantrip. Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for this spell (your choice when you gain this trait).

desc: Dragonborn are humanoids with the blood of dragons in their veins.

name: Dwarf
age: reach adulthood at 50 and live up to 350 years
size_description: Dwarves stand between 4 and 5 feet tall and average about 150 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Dwarvish.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.desc: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with the battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

traits.name: Tool Proficiency
traits.desc: You have proficiency with the smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.desc: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to the origin of stonework, you are considered proficient in the History skill and add double your proficiency bonus to the check, instead of your normal proficiency bonus.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Weapon Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

subspecies.name: Hill Dwarf
subspecies.desc: Hill dwarves have a connection to the earth that grants them additional vitality.

subspecies.name: Mountain Dwarf
subspecies.desc: Mountain dwarves are tough and resilient, forged by life in the harsh mountain terrain.

desc: Dwarves are known for their endurance, stonework, and strong sense of community.

name: Elf
age: reach adulthood at 100 and live up to 750 years
size_description: Elves stand between 5 and 6 feet tall and are slender, weighing about 100 to 150 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Elvish.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.desc: Elves don't need to sleep. Instead, they meditate deeply, remaining semiconscious, for 4 hours a day. (The Common word for this is trance.) While meditating, you can dream after a fashion.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with the longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

subspecies.name: High Elf
subspecies.desc: High elves are the most common type of elf in many lands.

subspecies.name: Wood Elf
subspecies.desc: Wood elves are at home in forests and wilderness areas.

subspecies.name: Drow
subspecies.desc: Drow are dark elves who live in the Underdark.

desc: Elves are a magical and long-lived people known for their skill with weapons and magic.

name: Gnome
age: reach adulthood at 40 and live up to 350 years
size_description: Gnomes stand between 3 and 4 feet tall and average about 40 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Gnomish.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.desc: You have advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Gnome Magic
traits.desc: You know the mage hand cantrip. You can also cast the disguise self and disguise self spells once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

subspecies.name: Forest Gnome
subspecies.desc: Forest gnomes have a natural affinity for nature and animals.

subspecies.name: Rock Gnome
subspecies.desc: Rock gnomes are inventive and skilled with machinery.

desc: Gnomes are known for their curiosity, invention, and connection to nature.

name: Goliath
age: reach adulthood at 18 and live up to 125 years
size_description: Goliaths stand between 6 and 7 feet tall and weigh between 250 and 300 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Giant.

traits.name: Athletic
traits.desc: You have proficiency in the Athletics skill.

traits.name: Stone's Endurance
traits.desc: As a bonus action, you can roll a d12 and add your Constitution modifier. You can use this feature a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a long rest. You can add the number rolled to your AC, saving throw, or ability check.

traits.name: Mountain Born
traits.desc: You are accustomed to high altitudes, including the thin air and snow-covered peaks. You are resistant to cold damage, and you can hold your breath for up to an hour.

desc: Goliaths are tall, powerful humanoids from mountainous regions.

name: Halfling
age: reach adulthood at 20 and live up to 150 years
size_description: Halflings stand between 3 and 4 feet tall and average about 40 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Halfling.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.desc: When you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Brave
traits.desc: You have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.desc: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

subspecies.name: Lightfoot Halfling
subspecies.desc: Lightfoot halflings are naturally stealthy and can hide in plain sight.

subspecies.name: Stout Halfling
subspecies.desc: Stout halflings have resistance to poison damage and immunity to being poisoned.

desc: Halflings are small, nimble, and lucky folk known for their love of comfort and home.

name: Human
age: reach adulthood at 18 and live up to 100 years
size_description: Humans vary widely in height and build, but most stand between 5 and 6 feet tall.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common.

language_options.additional: One additional language of your choice

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.desc: You know one additional language of your choice.

traits.name: All-Rounder
traits.desc: You gain a feat of your choice at 1st level.

traits.name: Heroic Inspiration
traits.desc: You start each day with Heroic Inspiration.

desc: Humans are the most versatile and adaptable of all the player character races.

name: Orc
age: reach adulthood at 14 and live up to 60 years
size_description: Orcs stand between 6 and 7 feet tall and weigh between 240 and 280 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Orcish.

traits.name: Aggressive
traits.desc: As a bonus action, you can move up to your speed toward a hostile creature of your choice that you can see or hear. You must end this move closer to the creature than you started.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.desc: When you drop to 0 hit points but are not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.desc: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time and add it to the extra damage of the critical hit.

desc: Orcs are fierce warriors known for their strength and endurance.

name: Tiefling
age: reach adulthood at 18 and live up to 100 years
size_description: Tieflings are similar in size and build to humans, typically standing between 5 and 6 feet tall and weighing between 130 and 180 pounds.
language_desc: You can speak, read, and write Common and Infernal.

traits.name: Hellish Resistance
traits.desc: You have resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.desc: You know the thaumaturgy cantrip. When you reach 3rd level, you can also cast the hellish rebuke spell once with this trait and regain the ability to do so when you finish a long rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

desc: Tieflings have infernal bloodlines and are marked by their devilish heritage.
